products.name: Black - Mafia Italian Chelsea
products.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Mafia Chelsea

Refined, timeless, and effortlessly versatile, this Italian Chelsea Leather Boot is crafted for the modern gentleman who values both sophistication and comfort. Made from premium full Crust leather with a sleek hand-polished finish, it delivers a luxurious look that only gets better with age.

The clean, minimalist silhouette is complemented by elastic side panels and rear pull tabs, allowing for easy slip-on wear while ensuring a secure fit. Its streamlined almond-toe design makes it equally suited for business attire, smart-casual outfits, or evening occasions.

Built on a durable outsole with a comfortable cushioned footbed, this boot offers lasting support without compromising on elegance.

Key Features:

Premium Italian full-Crust leather upper
Hand-polished finish for a rich, luxurious appearance
Classic Chelsea boot design with elastic side gussets
Soft leather lining for enhanced comfort and breathability
Cushioned insole for all-day wear
Durable, anti-slip outsole for superior grip
Rear pull tabs for easy on-and-off
Sleek almond-toe silhouette
Ideal for formal, business, and smart-casual occasions

products.name: Black - Wide Toe Chelsea
products.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Black Patina

Crafted from premium Italian crust leather, this Chelsea Boot combines timeless craftsmanship with modern elegance. The naturally finished crust leather develops a rich patina over time, making every pair uniquely yours. Featuring a clean, streamlined silhouette with a refined round toe, it delivers effortless sophistication for both formal and smart-casual occasions.

The elastic side panels and pull tabs ensure easy slip-on convenience, while the soft leather lining and cushioned footbed provide exceptional comfort throughout the day. Finished with a durable anti-slip outsole, this boot is designed to offer lasting performance without compromising on style.

Key Features
Premium Italian crust leather upper
Rich hand-finished surface that develops a unique patina
Classic Chelsea boot with stretch elastic side panels
Soft genuine leather lining for breathability
Cushioned leather footbed for all-day comfort
Durable anti-slip outsole for reliable traction
Rear pull tabs for easy wear
Refined round-toe silhouette for versatile styling
Perfect for business, formal, and smart-casual wear

products.name: Wine - Wide Toe Chelsea
products.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Burgundy Patina

Elevate your footwear collection with this handcrafted Italian Chelsea Boot, made from premium crust leather and finished with a rich hand-burnished burgundy patina. Designed for those who appreciate refined craftsmanship, the leather develops a deeper character over time, making each pair truly one of a kind.

The sleek Chelsea silhouette is paired with stretch elastic side panels and pull tabs for effortless wear, while the soft leather lining ensures superior comfort throughout the day. A rugged anti-slip rubber outsole provides exceptional grip and stability, making this boot as practical as it is elegant.

Whether paired with tailored trousers, chinos, or premium denim, this versatile boot delivers timeless sophistication for every occasion.

Key Features
Premium Italian crust leather upper
Hand-burnished burgundy patina finish
Classic Chelsea boot design with elastic side gussets
Soft genuine leather lining for enhanced comfort
Cushioned footbed for all-day support
Heavy-duty anti-slip rubber outsole with deep traction pattern
Durable Goodyear-style welt construction look
Rear pull tabs for easy slip-on convenience
Perfect for formal, business, and smart-casual wear

products.name: TAN - Mafia Boot
products.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Tan

Experience timeless elegance with our Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot in Tan, expertly handcrafted from premium Italian crust leather. Featuring a rich hand-finished tan patina, each pair showcases unique depth and character that becomes even more beautiful with wear. The sleek, minimalist silhouette is enhanced with a convenient side zipper, offering effortless wear while maintaining a refined, contemporary look.

Designed with a soft leather lining, cushioned footbed, and a durable outsole, this boot delivers exceptional comfort and lasting performance for every occasion—from business meetings to evening outings.

Key Features
Premium Italian crust leather upper
Hand-burnished tan patina finish
Elegant side zipper for easy on-and-off
Soft genuine leather lining for breathable comfort
Cushioned footbed for all-day support
Durable, anti-slip outsole for superior grip

products.name: Burgundy - Snake Texture Chelsea
products.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Snake Texture Burgundy

Make a bold statement with our Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Snake Texture Burgundy, where premium craftsmanship meets distinctive luxury. Handcrafted from high-quality Italian crust leather, this boot features an elegant snake-textured embossed finish enhanced by a rich hand-burnished burgundy patina, creating a sophisticated look with exceptional depth and character.

Designed with a sleek silhouette and convenient side zipper, it offers effortless wear while maintaining a refined profile. The soft leather lining, cushioned footbed, and durable anti-slip outsole ensure lasting comfort and stability, making it the perfect choice for both formal occasions and elevated everyday style.

Key Features
Premium Italian crust leather upper
Luxurious embossed snake-texture finish
Hand-burnished burgundy patina for a unique look
Smooth side zipper for easy wear
Soft genuine leather lining for breathable comfort
Cushioned footbed for superior all-day support
Durable anti-slip rubber outsole
Sleek almond-toe silhouette
Lightweight construction with premium craftsmanship
Ideal for formal, business, evening, and smart-casual wear

products.name: Black - Wholecut Oxford
products.description:
Wholecut Black Formal Leather Shoe

Crafted from a single piece of premium genuine leather, this Wholecut Black Formal Shoe showcases timeless elegance and exceptional craftsmanship. Its seamless upper creates a sleek, refined silhouette, making it the perfect choice for business meetings, weddings, black-tie events, and other formal occasions.

Designed for both style and comfort, the shoe features a soft leather lining, cushioned insole, and a durable outsole that provides lasting support throughout the day. The polished black finish complements suits, tuxedos, and formal attire, delivering a sophisticated look with every step.

Key Features:

Premium genuine leather upper
Elegant wholecut design with a seamless finish
Soft leather lining for enhanced comfort
Cushioned footbed for all-day wear
Durable outsole with excellent grip
Classic black color for versatile formal styling
Ideal for office wear, weddings, parties, and special occasions

products.name: Black- Apron Toe Derby
products.description:
Apron Toe Derby Black Formal Leather Shoe

Refined, versatile, and crafted for lasting comfort, the Apron Toe Derby Black Formal Leather Shoe is a timeless addition to any gentleman's wardrobe. Made from premium genuine leather, it features a classic apron toe design with an open-lace Derby construction, offering a sophisticated look and a comfortable fit for all foot types.

The sleek black finish makes it an ideal choice for business meetings, office wear, weddings, and formal occasions. A soft inner lining, cushioned footbed, and durable outsole ensure all-day comfort without compromising on style.

Key Features:

Premium genuine leather upper
Classic apron toe detailing
Open-lace Derby design for a comfortable fit
Soft leather lining for enhanced comfort
Cushioned insole for all-day support
Durable outsole with reliable grip
Elegant black finish for versatile formal styling
Perfect for office wear, business meetings, weddings, and special occasions

products.name: Old Money Loafer - Burgundy Brown With White
products.description:
Old Money Burgundy Brown & White Penny Loafer

Timeless elegance meets modern sophistication with the Old Money Burgundy Brown & White Penny Loafer. Crafted from premium genuine leather, this luxurious loafer features a striking two-tone combination of rich burgundy brown and crisp white, inspired by classic European fashion. The iconic penny strap and hand-finished leather deliver a refined, vintage aesthetic, making it the perfect choice for those who appreciate understated luxury and effortless style.

Designed with a cushioned leather-lined interior and a durable outsole, this loafer offers exceptional comfort without compromising on elegance. Whether paired with tailored trousers, linen suits, chinos, or premium denim, it adds a distinguished old-money charm to every outfit.

Product Details:
Color: Burgundy Brown & White
Material: Premium Genuine Leather
Style: Old Money Penny Loafer
Design: Classic Two-Tone Contrast
Closure: Slip-On

Lining: Soft Leather Lining
Footbed: Cushioned for All-Day Comfort

products.description:
Old Money Burgundy Brown & Beige Penny Loafer

Inspired by timeless European elegance, the Old Money Burgundy Brown & Beige Penny Loafer is a refined expression of luxury and sophistication. Expertly crafted from premium genuine leather, this two-tone loafer blends a rich burgundy brown frame with a soft beige vamp, creating a distinguished look that embodies classic old-money style. The iconic penny strap, smooth hand-finished leather, and clean silhouette make it an essential addition to any gentleman's wardrobe.

Designed for both style and comfort, the loafer features a soft leather lining, cushioned footbed, and durable outsole for effortless all-day wear. Whether styled with tailored trousers, linen suits, chinos, or premium denim, it delivers an elegant statement suitable for every occasion.

product.description:
Italian Chelsea Crust Leather Boot – Mafia Chelsea

Refined, timeless, and effortlessly versatile, this Italian Chelsea Leather Boot is crafted for the modern gentleman who values both sophistication and comfort. Made from premium full Crust leather with a sleek hand-polished finish, it delivers a luxurious look that only gets better with age.

The clean, minimalist silhouette is complemented by elastic side panels and rear pull tabs, allowing for easy slip-on wear while ensuring a secure fit. Its streamlined almond-toe design makes it equally suited for business attire, smart-casual outfits, or evening occasions.

Built on a durable outsole with a comfortable cushioned footbed, this boot offers lasting support without compromising on elegance.

Key Features:

Premium Italian full-Crust leather upper
Hand-polished finish for a rich, luxurious appearance
Classic Chelsea boot design with elastic side gussets
Soft leather lining for enhanced comfort and breathability
Cushioned insole for all-day wear
Durable, anti-slip outsole for superior grip
Rear pull tabs for easy on-and-off
Sleek almond-toe silhouette
Ideal for formal, business, and smart-casual occasions

product.name: The Royal Chelsea Boot
product.description: Sleek, continuous single-piece leather cut Chelsea boot in rich Italian tan leather. Generous elasticated gussets, leather pull tabs, and robust storm-welted leather soles. Epitomizes royal elegance combined with modern durable craft.

preorders.name: Rajesh Kumar
preorders.notes: Please add extra memory foam premium inner cushions. Ensure fitting matches wide-toes sizing.
preorders.admin_note: Sourcing premium full-grain Italian calf crust. Confirmed to build onto custom extra-wide last. Hand dye process assigned.
preorders.style_desc: Custom Crocodile-Embossed Wingtip Boots. Royal dark green color wanted with golden buckles.

buybacks.admin_note: Evaluated by Senior Shoe Maker. Leather condition validated as structurally pristine. Approved for ₹4,500 upgrade exchange coupon.
buybacks.product_desc: 2-year old Estate Tan Oxford shoes. Worn occasionally, slight creases on vamp but stitching and Goodyear structure is immaculate.

offers.title: Website Launch
offers.description: Addtional 5% off with the other Benefits of YY leathers.

content_blocks.value: {"title":"The Legacy of YY Leathers","tagline":"Where Leather Meets Legacy — Bespoke Shoemakers","paragraphs":["Nestled in the historical center of premium leather processing in Chennai, India, YY Leathers began as a humble atelier with a singular vision: to preserve the delicate art of hand-crafted footwear. Every pair that enters our workshop goes through 150 meticulous steps, from selecting pristine full-grain calf skins to the precise, patient double stitches of leather welt.","We synthesize time-honored European Cordwaining techniques with native Indian shoe construction wisdom, fashioning masterwork shoes that last generations. Under the stewardship of master craftsmen, YY Leathers forms an iconic emblem of style, confidence, and uncompromising Indian heritage."],"founder":"Yogesh & Yashwanth (Master Shoemakers)","mission":"To offer Chennai the world's finest premium hand-crafted leather shoes, built strictly customized, and backed by our lifetime-grade circular Buy Back guarantee."}

[{"year":"Founding","title":"Atelier Foundation","desc":"First custom workshop opened in Chennai, offering bespoke fitting for royal dignitaries."},{"year":"2002","title":"Masters' Union Creation","desc":"Built our Master Guild uniting third-generation shoemakers to define bespoke Indian design standards."},{"year":"2010","title":"The Blake Handwelt Launch","desc":"Introduced our signature Blake-stitched single oak-bark sole model, bringing ultimate flexibility."},{"year":"2018","title":"Circular Buy Back Scheme","desc":"Pioneered India's first organic shoe recycling pledge, buy-backs that refurbish worn items."},{"year":"2026","title":"Digital Luxury Experience","desc":"Bringing bespoke royal ordering and premium pre-orders directly to national connoisseurs."}]

{"returns":"If your customized ready-to-wear shoe doesn't fit beautifully, we provide a complimentary re-sizing and fit adjustment services within 14 days of delivery. For orders custom crafted to individual measures, returns are not eligible but full bespoke scaling and alteration support is provided by our Chennai shop.","privacy":"YY Leathers protects customer fit records and billing information under stringent data privacy. We do not distribute foot measurement blueprints or contact info to any marketing partner.","shipping":"Within Chennai, courier deliveries are scheduled with white-gloved specialists. For other tier-1 metros in India, standard shipping completes securely within 3-5 working days.","buyback":"Every authentic YY Leather pair qualifies for our circular restoration ecosystem. Depending on leather depth and structural preservation, we grant up to 30% of original price as store-credit coupon codes or instant cash support.","preorders":"Pre-order items represent bespoke crafting allocated individually. Handcraft cycles require 15-25 days from confirmation of physical sizing. Standard token non-refundable down-payment of 30% binds the reservation."}
["website offer is going on grab your shoe"]
